name: Cajun Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Sausage, cut into 1/4 in. thick slices
1 lb Boneless chicken, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, brown the sausage and chicken together until no longer pink.
2. Add chopped onions, bell pepper, and minced garlic to the pot. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Pour in water, salt, cayenne pepper, bay leaves, and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil with the lid on.
5. Add shrimp and raw rice to the pot. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking until the water is absorbed and the rice is cooked through, stirring every 5 minutes for about 20-25 minutes.
6. Yield: 6-8 servings.
